summary: Modal checkbox overlay for per-source filter selection; emits filterOverlayConfirmMsg or filterOverlayCancelMsg on completion
state: filterOverlayModel value type; holds sources list, selected map (index → bool), cursor, confirmed/cancelled flags

observations.text: When all sources are selected on confirm, buildFilter returns an empty SourceFilter (match-all) rather than a Names filter containing all names — this preserves the invariant that empty filter = no filtering.

Initial state: if current filter is empty, all sources start selected; if filter has Names set, only matching sources start selected. Type-only filters are treated as empty for initialization purposes (all selected), which means applying a type filter then opening the overlay shows all items checked.
boxStyle is constructed on every View() call rather than cached — allocates a new lipgloss.Style on each render. Minor performance concern for high-frequency redraws.
Key matching uses direct msg.String() comparisons for space, 'a', 'n', 'enter', 'esc' rather than the global keys singleton — these are overlay-specific bindings not represented in keyMap.

confirmed and cancelled fields on filterOverlayModel are set but never read back by the parent (dashboard reads them via the emitted message, not via the model field) — they are purely for test observability.
